Moss-draped creek bend where hemlock roots cradle a shallow pool, surface dimpled by drips from fern fronds overhead, smooth stones glowing amber beneath.
Slot canyon narrows to shoulder-width; single beam of noon light ignites orange sandstone wall, illuminating swirl patterns carved by ancient water.
Tide pool captured in volcanic rock: purple starfish clinging to kelp holdfasts, barnacles clustered in shadowed crevice, anemones pulsing with the swell.
Fallen cedar log split open, interior galaxy of shelf fungi, emerald moss, and tiny white mushrooms fruiting from the decomposing heartwood.
Forest clearing no wider than a bedroom: glacier lilies push through leaf litter, single shaft of morning light, everything else in green shadow.
Grotto behind thin waterfall curtain, maidenhair ferns trembling in the mist, black stone slick and dripping, sound of water erasing everything else.
Desert seep in sandstone alcove: monkey flowers cluster around spring-fed pool, wet sand darkening the rock, coolness radiating from stone.
Creek oxbow edged with lichen-crusted boulders in gold and sage, water sliding over polished riverstones, Douglas-fir needles floating in the foam.
Sea cave at low tide reveals crescent of coarse sand, kelp strands drying at the margin, mineral smell, light reflecting blue from water outside.
Pitcher plant bog tucked in alpine saddle: sphagnum moss cushions vivid red, sundews jeweled with moisture, small pool reflecting overcast sky.
Redwood sorrel carpets the forest floor beside a seep spring, each leaf trefoil-bright, water threading through black humus, bark fragments soft underfoot.
Limestone grotto no taller than a crouch: calcified moss gardens, constant seep building travertine lip, ferns rooted in dissolved stone, air thick and cool.
Tidal shelf at surf's edge: Neptune's necklace seaweed drapes across granite, limpets patterning the rock, foam retreating through barnacle-studded channels.
Hemlock snag split by lightning, interior hollowed to cathedral: ghost pipe mushrooms cluster in the rot, sawdust mounded below, wood grain spiraling upward.
Creek plunge no higher than a doorway: water polishes basalt into smooth bowl, spray-zone bright with liverwort, mist catching fragments of forest light.
Sandstone pothole worn perfectly round, rainwater collected amber-dark, tadpole shrimp tracing circles, rim painted white with evaporite minerals.
Oak root hollow at creekside: sword ferns arch over the opening, winter wren nest tucked in moss, stone floor worn smooth by seasonal flooding.
Slot between boulders in old avalanche field: maidenhair spleenwort growing from the crack, air ten degrees cooler, sound dampened to breath and drip.
Tidepool in wave-cut platform: chiton shells patterned like cobblestones, red algae painting the basin, hermit crab shells clicking across submerged ledges.
Spring-head emerging from fractured schist: watercress bright in the current, sand boiling up from the source, aspen roots exposed and chalk-white in flow.
Cedar hollow thick with licorice fern, walls soft with moss layers, nurse log sagging into mulch, bracket fungi climbing toward filtered canopy light.
Basalt shelf pooling snowmelt: forget-me-nots lean over still water, pollen dusting the surface film, columbine roots threading cracks in the black stone.
Pocket beach inside arch cave: wave-sorted pebbles ranging thumb-sized to sand, dried salt lines mark high tide, echo of surf dampened to whisper.
Gully cut through fern meadow: sword and lady fern overlap in tiers, creek barely ankle-deep, banana slugs crossing damp stones, everything dripping green.
Sandstone tank filled by summer storm: fairy shrimp eggs waiting years for water, algae blooming rust-red at the edges, swallows dipping wings overhead.
Boulder choke in mountain stream: water splits around granite, foxtail moss submerged and swaying, spray zone bright with stonecrop, sound magnified by enclosure.
Crevice garden in cliff seep: shooting stars nodding over drip-line, saxifrage clinging to mineral stain, rock face black and weeping, roots pale as thread.
Oak-shaded streambed in late summer: leaf litter drifted against boulders, water reduced to whisper, skunk cabbage yellowing, everything waiting for rain.
Eroded hollow beneath root mass: soil ceiling held by intertwined hemlock and huckleberry, floor powdered with dry rot, single green shoot emerging.
Volcanic blister cave at meadow's edge: ceiling dripping with moisture, pearly everlasting growing in the entrance, cool air spilling downhill, stone rust-orange with iron.
Shallow basin carved in granite, filled with glacial melt: alpine buttercups ring the margin, sediment settled in amber layers, snowmelt threading in from lichen-painted rim.
Fern-choked ravine where creek tumbles over stacked shale, each tier slick with blackened moss, mist hanging in the understory, sound swallowed by stone and green.
Salt marsh channel at ebb tide: cordgrass stems gleaming wet, mud surface pocked with crab holes, tidal current threading silver through channels edged with pickleweed.
Hollow in driftwood log half-buried in dune sand: sea rocket sprouting from decay, interior sculpted smooth by wind, salt crystals frosting the grain.
Cliffside alcove dripping with columbine: roots suspended over void, petals trembling in updraft, sandstone streaked green with algae, swallows darting past the opening.
Creek ford where water spreads across bedrock shelf: current polishing stone to glass, caddisfly cases dotting shallows, willow roots drinking at the margin.
Sinkhole pond ringed with sphagnum hummocks: cranberry vines trailing red across moss, dragonfly exuviae clinging to sedge stems, water black and perfectly still.
Redwood burl weeping moisture: five-finger ferns unfurling from the growth, bark fissures deep enough to hide a fist, wood grain swirling around ancient injury.
Boulder shadow on desert floor after rare rain: cryptobiotic crust beaded with water, petroglyph lichen expanding gold across stone face, sand darkened and fragrant.
Undercut bank where tree roots cage a backwater: duckweed filming the surface, water striders dimpling the meniscus, clay bank crumbling into slow current.
Limestone spring bubbling through gravel bed, watercress stems bending in the current, calcite coating every pebble white, overflow vanishing into sandy soil downstream.
Granite slab split by frost wedging: polypody ferns root in the fracture, rainwater pooled in the cleft, quartz crystals glinting from the broken face.
Tidal channel carved through mudstone bench: rockweed draped in layers, periwinkle snails clustered above waterline, puddles left behind mirror the fog.
Hollow stump filled with last week's rain: bracket fungi stepping up the interior wall, oak leaves floating in tannin-dark water, bark peeling in papery scrolls.
Seep emerging from talus slope: monkey flowers crowd the outflow, cobbles stained orange with iron, mist rising where cold water meets warm air.
Basalt overhang sheltering a sand patch: columbine and alumroot cling to the ceiling crack, drip-line marks the stone, swallow nest mud still clinging above.
Creek narrows between schist slabs: water goes translucent over white stone, foam caught in eddy pockets, jewelweed leaning from the bank in afternoon light.
Driftwood tangle at estuary mouth: bull kelp stipes drying to leather, sand dollars wedged between logs, cordgrass seeds sprouting in trapped sediment.
Volcanic tuff eroded into honeycomb pockets: each cell holds a teaspoon of soil, stonecrop blooming yellow, lichens painting concentric rings around the openings.
Shale outcrop weeping through layered bedding planes: maidenhair fern cascading from every seam, stone flaking like pages, moss cushions swollen with moisture.
